text: The ground beneath you is slowly sliding on giant tectonic plates. These plates form Earth's lithosphere, floating on molten rock. Can you feel it moving? Mid-ocean ridges pull plates apart, while subduction zones push them down. Imagine the pressure! This movement causes earthquakes and volcanoes. They can erupt without warning! Understanding these forces helps us predict disasters and appreciate our dynamic planet. What if the ground shifted right now? Curious about our Earth? Hit like and follow for more geological wonders!
